title: Undead Horses Overhaul
description: Adds new undead horses like drowned horse, stray horse, and gives some features to the zombie horse
body:
Hey Hey Hey
This is the UNDEAD HORSES OVERHAUL DATAPACK
There are just sooo many features in this datapack!!

How to get all the Horses and some of their uses are explained at the end. Please read through it.

FEATURES - 

1. Starting with the Skeleton horses 
Nothing much just a new advancement to sit on the skeleton horse
"Neigh-cromancer" - Sit on a skeleton horse

2. Next we have is the Zombie horses
These have been in the game for a long time but never been used by Minecraft so i decided to add a ZOMBIE RAID
4 zombie horsemen spawn and amongst them one is the captain having the special shield. 
Sitting on a zombie horse gives a new advancement - "Ghoul Rider"
If a player is sitting on a zombie horse, all mobs in a 7 block radius get weakness effect

3. Next we have the Drowned horse
Just like how zombie can be converted to drowned, drowning a zombie horse in a river or ocean will make it a Drowned Horse. 
Sitting on the drowned horse gives an advancement - "Soggy Saddle"
Riding a drowned horse underwater is pretty useful as it gives more speed underwater and unlike real horses u can ride it underwater too
Be careful on thunderstorm nights, if thunder strikes the drowned horse, then a drowned with trident spawns on top of it and 4 drowned zombies around it!
Saving the horse and riding on it gives a new advancement - "Seahorsepower"

4. Lastly we have the Stray horse
Trap a skeleton horse in a 3 by 3 by 2 powdered snow box and then watch it get converted into a Stray horse
Sitting on a stray horse gives the advancement "Horse, but Make It Chilly"
If a player is riding on it, all mobs in a 5 blocks radius get slowness effect. 
Be careful before taking it into a snowy biome. If it snows on a stray horse, an army of 4 strays and another stray riding the horse spawn to attack you. Surviving the attack and saving the horse gives a new advancement "The Cold War"

UPDATE(LATEST) -

**Desert Variants** have been added

**Husk Horse**-
- This is the Desert variant of the Zombie Horse
- When a Zombie Horse spends a day in the Desert, it gets converted into a Husk Horse
- The Husk Horse gives Saturation to the player riding it
- When the Husk Horse is drowned in water it becomes a Zombie Horse

**Mummy Horse**-
- -When the Husk Horse is taken to the Desert Pyramid and placed in the center of it, the Husk Horse converts into a Mummy Horse and also summons a few Husk Zombies.
- -Defeating the Husk Zombies and riding the Mummy Horse gives a new Advancement!

UPDATE - 

**Now we have the Bogged Horse**
Drown a Skeleton Horse in the waters of a Swamp or Mangrove Swamp and in a few seconds it coverts into a Bogged Horse. Its features are -
- First a basic one, riding it gives us the advancement - "Riding the Rot"
- Now the cool one, if there is a Bogged Skeleton in a 3 blocks radius of the Bogged Horse, the Horse cures the Bogged back into a normal Skeleton. If a grass or dirt block is below, it gets converted into a mud block.
- Curing 20 Bogged Skeletons gives you and advancement 
- "The Great Unbogging"- However that's not it, a Bogged trap spawns in a similar fashion of Stray and Drowned traps. 
- You get an advancement for capturing the Bogged Horse back - "Slime in the Saddle"

**Wither Horse**
You will have to take one of your skeleton horses to the Nether Fortress and then make a wither rose bed get your Skeleton Horse to stand on the rose bed for a few seconds and the Nether Fortress' power to summon Wither Skeletons riding a Wither Horse gets activated! You also get an advancement for doing this - "This Cannot Go Wrong". It's other features are -
- Anyone riding the mob gets cured of the wither effect
- Every time the game spawns a Wither Skeleton, there is 0.1% chance that a Wither Skeleton spawns with the Wither Horse. -The Wither Skeleton carries the Wither Gonfalon and on obtaining it you get another advancement 
- "Waved the Witherflag"-Riding the Wither Horse gives an Advancement - "Wither You Like It or Not"

**Piglin Patrols**
There is a small chance when you are in the nether that Piglin Patrol spawns around you. The Pigling Patrol consists of 2 Piglins with Crossbows, 2 Piglins with Golden Swords, a Piglin Brute riding a Hoglin and 2 Zombified Piglins with the Piglin Gonfalon. Also, carrying the Piglin Gonfalon gives you another advancement - "Piglin Patrol? Not Anymore"

**Zombie Horse Curing**
Zombie Horses can now be cured into normal horses using weakness potion and 5 golden carrots. After splashing the weakness potion, drop 5 golden carrots near the Zombie Horse and the curing process starts. It takes about a minute for the Horse to get cured.

**REQUIREMENTS**
You also need to use a resourcepack which needs optifine
However if u dont use optifine and use fabric mods like sodium, u can install Optifabric. The installation process is simple and even I used [this.](https://youtu.be/Maj_HxyvFsM)

[Required Resourcepack Download](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/undead-horses-overhaul/)

**THIS IS VERY IMPORTANT**
After u install the datapack in your wolrd
use the command "/function undead_horse:load"


<details>
<summary>Walkthrough of all horses added</summary>
  
**Zombie Horse** - It has a 0.01% chance of spawning every night, going close to it will summon the Zombie Trap. The Zombie Trap consists of 4 Zombie Horsemen, equipped with iron armor, one being the leader and has a shield called Soulstolen Guard Shield . When a player rides the Zombie Horse, all mobs in a 7 block radius get weakness effect.
  
  **Drowned Horse** - Trapping a Zombie Horse in 3 x 3 x 4 volume of water for sometime converts it into a Drowned horse. You can ride it underwater and even have a speed boost while riding it. When lightning strikes the Drowned Horse, it summons an attack consisting of 4 Drowned Zombies around it and and one Drowned Zombie riding it with a Trident in hand and all of them are equipped with golden armor.

**Stray Horse** - Trapping a Skeleton Horse in 3 x 3 x 2 volume of powdered snow converts it to a Stray Horse. A Stray Horse gives slowness effect to all mobs in a 5 blocks radius when a player is riding it. If it snows on a Stray Horse (when it rains in a biome which is cold, specifically biomes which have "snowy" in their name), it summons an attack consisting 4 Strays surrounding the horse and one on the Stray Horse all equipped with iron armor.

**Bogged Horse** - Drown a Skeleton Horse in 3 x 3 x 4 colume of water in a Swamp or Mangrove Swamp for a few seconds. The Bogged horse can cure Bogged Skeletons in a radius of 3 blocks. After curing 20 Bogged Skeletons, a trap of Bogged Skeletons spawn. 

**Wither Horse** - Take your skeleton horse into the Nether Fortress and make it stand in the centre of a 3 by 3 wither rose bed. Once you get the advancement, there is 1 in 10 chance that a wither skeleton spawns with a wither horse.
</details>
